(Any cards attached to Rain Castform, damage counters, Special Conditions, and effects on it are now on the new Pokémon.) Shuffle Rain Castform back into your deck. You can't use more than 1 Temperamental Weather Poké-Power each turn.

attacks.name: Holon Splash
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Holon Energy card attached to Rain Castform.

name: Tentacruel

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Seething Tentacles
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Normally, it has 80 poisonous tentacles. The longer one has been alive, the fewer tentacles it will have.

name: Feraligatr

abilities.name: Downpour
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Water Energy card from your hand.

attacks.name: Riptide
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Water Energy card in your discard pile. Then, shuffle those cards into your deck.

flavorText: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: Dratini
flavorText: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

abilities.name: Solid Shell
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done by your opponent's Pokémon to each of your Benched Pokémon that has δ on its card.

attacks.name: Grind
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Cloyster.

name: Palkia-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Spatial Control
attacks.text: Move any number of Energy from your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hydro Pressure
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage times the amount of Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Zero Vanish-GX
attacks.text: Shuffle all Energy from each of your opponent's Pokémon into their deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Carry In
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Pokémon Tool Card, a Supporter card, and a basic Energy card, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It loves crossing the sea with people and Pokémon on its back. It understands human speech.

name: Milotic

attacks.name: Clear Search
attacks.text: Search your deck for any 3 cards and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Its lovely scales are described as rainbow colored. They change color depending on the viewing angle.

name: Sandslash

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: If it digs at an incredible pace, it may snap off its spike and claws. They grow back in a day.

name: Light Piloswine

abilities.name: Fluffy Wool
abilities.text: During your opponent's turn, if Light Piloswine is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by your opponent's attack (even if it's Knocked Out), flip a coin. If heads, the attacking Pokémon is now Asleep. This power stops working if Light Piloswine is already Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed when your opponent attacks.

attacks.name: Knock Over
attacks.text: If there is a Stadium card in play, you may discard it.

flavorText: Its legs are short, but its hooves are wide and flat, allowing it to easily walk over snow.

name: Darumaka

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

attacks.name: Muddy Bomb
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon and 10 damage to each of your opponent's other Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Raging Sea
attacks.text: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Aerial Maneuvers
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage, and, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Koga's Pidgeotto. If tails, this attack does 10 damage.

name: Solgaleo-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Ultra Road
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sunsteel Strike
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sol Burst-GX
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 5 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Bergmite

attacks.name: Stomp Off
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It blocks opponents' attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.

name: Machamp

attacks.name: Macho Revenge
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each Fighting Pokémon in your discard pile.

attacks.name: Dynamite Punch
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavorText: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

name: Jynx

attacks.name: Icy Kiss
attacks.text: If Jynx was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Lovely Kiss
attacks.text: Move 2 damage counters from Jynx to the Defending Pokémon. If Smoochum is anywhere under Jynx, move 4 damage counters instead.

flavorText: It cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.

name: Ducklett
flavorText: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

attacks.name: Destructive Roar
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gigacrush
attacks.text: Each player discards the top 3 cards from his or her deck.

name: Simisear

attacks.name: Flare Recharge
attacks.text: Attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

name: Bounsweet
flavorText: Because of its sweet, delicious aroma, bird Pokémon are always after it, but it's not intelligent enough to care.

name: Team Magma's Poochyena

attacks.name: Infiltrate
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals his or her hand.

flavorText: Poochyena's nose can identify any scent. It's very useful for reconnaissance.

name: Dark Dugtrio

abilities.name: Sinkhole
abilities.text: Whenever your opponent's Active Pokémon retreats, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, this power does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.) This power stops working while Dark Dugtrio is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Knock Down
attacks.text: Your opponent flips a coin. If tails, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage; if heads, this attack does 20 damage.

flavorText: Digs large sinkholes in the ground and tries to trap its enemies in them.

name: Panpour
flavorText: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: Gastrodon

attacks.name: Sticky Shot
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's attacks cost Colorless more, and its Retreat Cost is Colorless more.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It apparently had a huge shell for protection in ancient times. It lives in shallow tidal pools.

name: Victini V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Spreading Flames
attacks.text: Attach up to 3 Fire Energy cards from your discard pile to your Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Energy Burst
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.

name: Moltres

attacks.name: Wildfire
attacks.text: You may discard any number of Fire Energy cards attached to Moltres when you use this attack. If you do, discard that many cards from the top of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Dive Bomb
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: Dhelmise

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Powerful Spin
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: The soul of seaweed adrift in the waves became reborn as this Pokémon. It maintains itself with new infusions of seabed detritus and seaweed.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Reinforced Flame
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It draws in air through its tail, transforms it into fire, and uses it like a tongue. It melts Durant and eats them.

name: Metal Energy
rules:
Damage done to the Pokémon Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). If the Pokémon Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal, whenever it damages a Pokémon, reduce that damage by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Kyurem-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.text: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Giga Frost
attacks.text: Discard 2 Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Poliwhirl

attacks.name: Finishing Blow
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: It can live in or out of water. When out of water, it constantly sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Meganium

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Giant Bloom
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters from Meganium.

flavorText: Meganium's breath has the power to revive dead grass and plants. It can make them healthy again.

name: Psyduck
flavorText: It has mystical powers but doesn't recall that it has used them. That is why it always looks puzzled.

name: Darmanitan

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: When weakened in battle, it transforms into a stone statue, then it sharpens its mind and fights on mentally.

name: Reshiram

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.text: Does 10 or more for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.text: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: There's a hole in its tail that allows it to draw in the air it needs to keep its fire burning. If the hole gets blocked, this Pokémon will fall ill.

name: Wooper
flavorText: When the temperature cools in the evening, they emerge from water to seek food along the shore.

attacks.name: Tail Shake
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Golduck

attacks.name: Amnesia
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Swim
attacks.text: If any of your opponent's Pokémon have any Water Energy attached to them, you may do 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon instead of their Active Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Even fast-swimming fish Pokémon can be disabled by Golduck. It brings them to a standstill and seizes them.

name: Charizard VMAX
rules: VMAX rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: G-Max Wildfire
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Pansear

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600º F.

abilities.name: Retreat Aid
abilities.text: As long as Dodrio is on your Bench, you pay ColorlessColorless less to retreat your Active Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex and Baby Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Tri Attack
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Zarude V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Jungle Rising
attacks.text: You may attach up to 2 basic Energy cards from your hand to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, heal all damage from that Pokémon.

name: Floatzel

attacks.name: Screw Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.text: Does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Floatzel but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

flavorText: It floats using its well-developed floatation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Torchic.

name: Larvesta

attacks.name: Super Singe
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.

name: Arbok

abilities.name: Last Pattern
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, discard 2 random cards from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Rocket Tail
attacks.text: If Jessie & James is in your discard pile, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: The latest research has determined that there are over 20 possible arrangements of the patterns on its stomach.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Pull Away
attacks.text: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in his or her hand, your opponent discards a number of cards until your opponent has 4 cards left in his or her hand.

name: Swinub
flavorText: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

attacks.name: High Voltage
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't play Trainer cards during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Thunder Flare
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Lt. Surge's Jolteon, then flip a coin. If tails, Lt. Surge's Jolteon does 30 damage to itself.

name: Avalugg

attacks.name: Frost Barrier
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Shatter
attacks.text: Discard any Stadium card in play.

flavorText: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Skarmory.

flavorText: After nesting in bramble bushes, the wings of its chicks grow hard from scratches by thorns.

name: Magby
rules: If your Active Pokémon is a Baby Pokémon and your opponent announces an attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything else). If tails, your opponent's turn ends.

attacks.name: Energy Catch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put a basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Palkia

attacks.name: Spacial Rend
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If there is any Stadium card in play, discard it.

attacks.name: Transback
attacks.text: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard all Energy attached to Palkia and put the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it on top of your opponent's deck. Your opponent shuffles his or her deck afterward.

flavorText: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: Dark Golbat

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.text: When you play Dark Golbat from your hand, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If you do, Dark Golbat does 10 damage to that Pokémon. Apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Flitter
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

flavorText: Sneaks up silently on its prey and attacks it from behind, sometimes killing it with one bite.

attacks.name: Double Pinchers
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dark Poison
attacks.text: Discard a basic Energy card attached to Team Aqua's Corphish or this attack does nothing. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Empoleon

attacks.name: Knock Off
attacks.text: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.

attacks.name: Jet Smash
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Empoleon can't use Jet Smash during your next turn.

flavorText: If anyone were to hurt its pride, it would slash them with wings that can cleave through an ice floe.

name: Froakie

abilities.name: Frubbles
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached to it, it has no Retreat Cost.

flavorText: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: Malamar

abilities.name: Psychic Recharge
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It lures prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: Any damage done to Dewgong by attacks from Fire Pokémon and Water Pokémon is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Ice Shard
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Fighting Pokémon, this attack's base damage is 80 instead of 30.

name: Articuno

attacks.name: Diamond Dust
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: This legendary Pokémon is said to freeze the water in the air during winter, causing snow.

name: Turtonator

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance and can be put to various uses.

name: Simipour

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Stadium Wave
attacks.text: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Golem GL.

attacks.name: Double-edge
attacks.text: Golem E4 does 60 damage to itself.

name: Steenee

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It's protected by its hard sepals, so it plays with bird Pokémon without worry. They peck it relentlessly, but it doesn't care.

name: Darumaka

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

name: Plusle

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Plusle does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It absorbs electricity from telephone poles. It shorts out its body to create crackling noises.

abilities.name: Fragrance Trap
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, and if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with his or her Active Pokémon. This power can't be used if Erika's Victreebel is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Slugma

attacks.name: Magma Ring
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Its body is made of magma. If it doesn't keep moving, its body will cool and harden.

name: Tropius

attacks.name: Fresh-Picked Fruit
attacks.text: Remove 6 damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: The bunch of fruit around its neck ripens twice a year and is delicious. It's a highly favored tropical snack.

abilities.name: Metallic Lift
abilities.text: If Skarmory has any Metal Energy attached to it, the Retreat Cost for Skarmory is 0.

attacks.name: Spearhead
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Heavy Metal
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Metal Energy attached to Skarmory. This attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Articuno-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Frost Prison
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Invisible Hand
attacks.text: If any of your opponent's Active Pokémon are Evolved Pokémon, search your deck for any 1 card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Repulsion
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent returns the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to his or her hand. (If your opponent doesn't have any Benched Pokémon or other Active Pokémon, this attack does nothing.)

attacks.name: Psychic Erase
attacks.text: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

abilities.name: Stages of Evolution
abilities.text: As long as Hitmontop is an Evolved Pokémon, is your Active Pokémon, and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Hitmontop is Knocked Out), put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Upward Kick
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has at least 2 damage counters on it, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Zapdos

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.text: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A legendary Pokémon that is said to live in thunderclouds. It freely controls lightning bolts.

name: Dusknoir

abilities.name: Spirit Pulse
abilities.text: As long as Dusknoir is your Active Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Energy attached to it between turns.

attacks.name: Darkness Mist
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has 2 or more damage counters on it, this attack does 60 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

name: Armaldo

abilities.name: Fossil Armor
abilities.text: If Armaldo would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to Armaldo if that damage is 60 or less.

attacks.name: Crush Claw
attacks.text: During your next turn, if an attack does damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: It went ashore after evolving. Its entire body is clad in a sturdy armor.

name: Emolga

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: The energy made in its cheeks' electric pouches is stored inside its membranes and released while it is gliding.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Odor Sleuth
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Using their very hot, flame-covered tongues, they burn through Durant's steel bodies and consume their insides.

abilities.name: Dark Moon
abilities.text: As long as Umbreon is your Active Pokémon and has a Darkness Energy attached to it, once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at your opponent's hand. Choose from it a number of cards up to the number of Darkness Energy attached to Umbreon and shuffle them into your opponent's deck. Your opponent then draws the same number of cards from his or her deck. This power can't be used if Umbreon is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Shadow Bind
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Cleffa
rules: If this Baby Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and your opponent tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything required in order to use that attack). If tails, your opponent's turn ends without an attack.

attacks.name: Eeeeeeek
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw 7 cards.

flavorText: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Lunala-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Psychic Transfer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Psychic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Moongeist Beam
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't be healed during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Lunar Fall-GX
attacks.text: Knock Out 1 of your opponent's Basic Pokémon that isn't a Pokémon-GX. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Sudden Growth
attacks.text: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to Politoed.

attacks.name: Frog Hop
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Energy Splash
attacks.text: Move 2 Water Energy cards attached to Politoed to 1 or 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You may put both on the same Pokémon or 1 each on 2 different Pokémon.) If you have no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

name: Golem

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.text: Does 20 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Golem does 100 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

name: Darumaka

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: When it sleeps, it pulls its limbs into its body and its internal fire goes down to 1,100 F.

name: M Manectric-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Turbo Bolt
attacks.text: Attach 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Politoed

attacks.name: Roll Call
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Poliwag, a Poliwhirl, and a Poliwrath, and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hyper Jump
attacks.text: You may shuffle this Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your deck.

flavorText: They gather on moonlit nights to form a large chorus. Their cries sound angry and not at all pleasant, but they are certainly distinctive.

name: Wurmple

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It lives among the tall grass and in forests. It repels attacks by raising up the spikes on its rear.

name: Espeon

abilities.name: Sunlight Veil
abilities.text: Each of your Pokémon that evolves from Eevee gets +20 HP. You can't use more than 1 Sunlight Veil Poké-Body each turn.

attacks.name: Morning Sun
attacks.text: You may move an Energy card attached to Espeon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Its fur has the look and feel of velvet. The orb on its forehead glows when it uses psycho-power.

name: Volcarona

attacks.name: Fiery Dance
attacks.text: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Heat Wave
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

name: Torracat

attacks.name: Swagger
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.

name: Ampharos-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thunder Rod
attacks.text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck and attach as many Lightning Energy cards you find there as you like to this Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

attacks.name: Sparkling Tail
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Surprise
attacks.text: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking. Look at the card you chose, then have your opponent shuffle that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Bass Control
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Ponyta
flavorText: Its body is light, and its legs are incredibly powerful. It can clear Ayers Rock in one leap.

name: Entei

attacks.name: Rally Back
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during their last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: A Pokémon that races across the land. It is said that one is born every time a new volcano appears.

name: Abomasnow

abilities.name: Glacier Snow
abilities.text: If Abomasnow is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Abomasnow is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Heavy Blizzard
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.

abilities.name: Delta Protection
abilities.text: Any damage done to Dewgong by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that has δ on its card is reduced by 40 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Surge
attacks.text: If Dewgong has at least 2 Water Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Magmar

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather's body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Lucario V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Aura Sphere
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Beatdown Smash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Beatdown Smash.

name: Toxtricity V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Energize
attacks.text: Attach a Lightning Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Venom Slap
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Magmortar

attacks.name: Top Burner
attacks.text: For each Fire Energy attached to Magmortar, discard the top card from your opponent's deck. Then, flip a coin. If tail, discard all Fire Energy attached to Magmortar.

attacks.name: Burst Punch
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit out of its arms. Its breath also sears and sizzles.

abilities.name: Energy Variation
abilities.text: Kecleon's type is the same as every type of basic Energy card attached to Kecleon.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Dodrio

abilities.name: Echo Draw
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw a card. This power can't be used if Dodrio is affected by a Special Condition.

flavorText: When Doduo evolves into this odd breed, one of its heads splits into two. It runs at nearly 40 mph.

abilities.name: Tropical Motion
abilities.text: As long as Tropius is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Active Pokémon have no Resistance.

attacks.name: Miracle Blow
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Special Condition. The Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Houndoom V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Vengeful Flame
attacks.text: If your Benched Fire Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Sting Turn
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and switch Gligar with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tail Sting
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

abilities.name: Fragrance Trap
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch the Defending Pokémon with it. This Power can't be used if Victreebel is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Corrosive Acid
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

abilities.name: Fainting Spell
abilities.text: Once during your opponent's turn, if Gengar would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, you may flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Shadow Room
attacks.text: Put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. If that Pokémon has any Poké-Powers, put 6 damage counters on that Pokémon instead.

attacks.name: Poltergeist
attacks.text: Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 30 damage times the number of Trainer, Supporter, and Stadium cards in your opponent's hand.

name: Golduck

attacks.name: Derail
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: The forelegs are webbed, helping to make it an adept swimmer. It can be seen swimming elegantly in lakes, etc.

name: Pansear

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Tynamo
flavorText: One alone can emit only a trickle of electricity, so a group of them gathers to unleash a powerful electric shock.

name: Volcarona

abilities.name: Scorching Scales
abilities.text: Put 4 damage counters instead of 2 on your opponent's Burned Pokémon between turns.

attacks.name: Burning Wind
attacks.text: You may discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of their battles, since they use their six wings to scatter their ember scales.

name: Zacian V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Intrepid Sword
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and attach any number of Metal Energy cards you find there to this Pokémon. Put the other cards into your hand. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Brave Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Growlithe
flavorText: While it's quite friendly toward humans once it's grown used to them, in the wild it must be quite fierce to defend its territory from Rockruff.

name: Unown [G]
rules: You may have up to 4 Basic Pokémon cards in your deck with Unown in their names.

abilities.name: [Give]
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have Unown [G], Unown [I], Unown [V], and Unown [E] on your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It is believed that the variety of types of this Pokémon were created by evolutionary adaptation, as each possesses a different ability.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Rock Slide
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Azelf

abilities.name: Time Walk
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you put Azelf from your hand onto your Bench, you may look at all of your face-down Prize cards. If you do, you may choose 1 Pokémon you find there, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Then, choose 1 card in your hand and put it as a Prize card face down.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Known as "The Being of Willpower." It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: Magmortar

abilities.name: Flame Body
abilities.text: When you attach a Fire Energy card from your hand to Magmortar, remove 2 damage counters from Magmortar.

attacks.name: Flame Blast
attacks.text: Does 20 damage times the number of Fire Energy attached to Magmortar.

attacks.name: Fireball Bazooka
attacks.text: Does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

name: Muk

abilities.name: Toxic Gas
abilities.text: Ignore all Pokémon Powers other than Toxic Gases. This power stops working while Muk is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Sludge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: Flareon

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Kindle
attacks.text: Discard an Energy card attached to Flareon and then discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: It has a flame sac in its body. Its body temperature tops 1,650 degrees Fahrenheit before battle.

name: Alolan Sandshrew

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavorText: An ancient tradition of Alolan festivals, still carried on to this day, is a competition to slide Sandshrew across ice as far as one can.

attacks.name: Whirlpool
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Quagsire

abilities.name: Wash Out
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Water Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage times the amount of Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This carefree Pokémon has an easygoing nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

attacks.name: Dark Wave
attacks.text: All Pokémon Powers stop working until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Shadow Bind
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Torchic

ancientTrait.name: Ω Barrage
ancientTrait.text: This Pokémon may attack twice a turn. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, you may attack again after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Flare Bonus
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Froakie
flavorText: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: Darmanitan

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Damage Counterpunch
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: When one is injured in a fierce battle, it hardens into a stone-like form. Then it meditates and sharpens its mind.

attacks.name: Stockpile
attacks.text: During your next turn, Spit Up's base damage is 70 instead of 30, and Swallow's base damage is 60 instead of 20.

attacks.name: Swallow
attacks.text: After your attack, remove from Pelipper the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to the Defending Pokémon. If Pelipper has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

name: Chesnaught-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Torkoal

attacks.name: Fire Fling
attacks.text: Put 4 Fire Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Kindle
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: You can tell how it's feeling by the smoke spouting from its shell. Tremendous velocity is a sign of good health.

name: Salandit

attacks.name: Smog
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Its venom sacs produce a fluid that this Pokémon then heats up with the flame in its tail. This process creates Salandit's poisonous gas.

name: Magmar

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather's body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Tsareena

abilities.name: Queenly Reward
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Grass Energy card from your discard pile to your Active Pokémon.

flavorText: A master of grand and beautiful kicks, it can knock out even kickboxing champions with a single blow.

name: Sandslash δ
rules: This Pokémon is both Fighting Metal type.

abilities.name: Delta Storm
abilities.text: As long as Sandslash is your Active Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon-ex between turns.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Staryu

attacks.name: Numbing Water
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: In many places, there are folktales of stardust falling into the ocean and becoming Staryu.

name: Fletchinder

attacks.name: Flame Charge
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.

name: Incineroar-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hustling Strike
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Fire Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tiger Swing
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Burning Slam-GX
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Poliwrath

attacks.name: Steamroll
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Submission
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: With its extremely tough muscles, it can keep swimming in the Pacific Ocean without resting.

name: Swinub

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Rooting the tip of its snout into the ground, it searches for food. Sometimes, it even digs up a hot spring.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Teleport Blast
attacks.text: After your attack, you may switch Grumpig with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Strange Spiral
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Poliwrath is your Active Pokémon, you may discard a basic Energy card attached to Poliwrath. If you do, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. This power can't be used if Poliwrath is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Spiral Punch
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Mud Splash
attacks.text: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Shinx

attacks.name: Paralyzing Gaze
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Boosted Voltage
attacks.text: If Raichu has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that isn't an Evolved Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.text: Discard a Lightning Energy card attached to Raichu.

flavorText: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

name: Koffing
flavorText: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.

name: Smoochum

abilities.name: Sweet Sleeping Face
abilities.text: As long as Smoochum is Asleep, prevent all damage done to Smoochum by attacks.

attacks.name: Energy Antics
attacks.text: Move an Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another of your opponent's Pokémon. Smoochum is now Asleep.

flavorText: Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

name: Ariados

abilities.name: Sticky
abilities.text: The Retreat Cost for each player's Pokémon (excluding Ariados) is Colorless more.

attacks.name: Offensive Needle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It attaches silk to its prey and sets it free. Later, it tracks the silk to the prey and its friends.

name: Delibird

attacks.name: All the Presents
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, you may search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Although it naturally prefers colder locales, Delibird in Alola seem able to withstand the heat to a certain extent.

attacks.name: Sonicboom
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Rumble
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Pull Down
attacks.text: If your opponent has any Evolved Pokémon in play, remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of them and put those cards back into his or her hand.

attacks.name: Hydrocannon
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Omastar but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

name: Pidgeotto

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.text: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.text: If Pidgeotto was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Pidgeotto to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Very protective of its sprawling territory, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Giratina

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch Giratina with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Broken-space Blow
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out by this attack, put the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to in the Lost Zone instead of the discard pile.

flavorText: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

name: M Ampharos-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Exavolt
attacks.text: You may do 50 more damage and leave your opponent's Active Pokémon Paralyzed. If you do, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

name: Latias

attacks.name: Miraculous Light
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters and all Special Conditions from Latias.

attacks.name: Mist Ball
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy and a Water Energy attached to Latias.

flavorText: Its body is covered with a down that can refract light in such a way that it becomes invisible.

name: Nidoqueen

attacks.name: Return
attacks.text: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Prize Count
attacks.text: If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, this attack does 50 damage plus 30 more damage.

flavorText: It uses its scaly, rugged body to seal the entrance of its nest and protect its young from predators.

attacks.name: Dragon Dew
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon (remove 1 if there is only 1).

name: Piloswine

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep. Heal 90 damage from it.

flavorText: Although its legs are short, its rugged hooves prevent it from slipping, even on icy ground.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Electrike
flavorText: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

name: M Alakazam-EX
rules: Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.
Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Zen Force
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Simisear

attacks.name: Water's Power
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.text: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

name: Silcoon

attacks.name: Cocoon Collector
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 4 in any combination of Silcoon and Cascoon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It drinks dew that collects on its silk and waits for evolution. Its hard cocoon repels attacks.

name: Poipole

attacks.name: Spit Poison
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Knockout Reviver
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is Knocked Out, your opponent can't take any Prize cards for it.

flavorText: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: Beedrill

attacks.name: Triple Poison
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Your opponent now puts 3 damage counters on it instead of 1 after each player's turn (even if it was already Poisoned).

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It can take down any opponent with its powerful poison stingers. It sometimes attacks in swarms.

abilities.name: Soothing Aroma
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon that has any. This power can't be used if Meganium is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Poisonpowder
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Basculin

attacks.name: Bared Fangs
attacks.text: If, before this Pokémon does damage, the Defending Pokémon has no damage counters on it, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Red and blue Basculin usually do not get along, but sometimes members of one school mingle with the other's school.

attacks.name: Influence
attacks.text: Search your deck for Omanyte, Kabuto, Aerodactyl, Lileep, or Anorith and put up to 2 of them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. Treat the new Benched Pokémon as Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Stretch Claws
attacks.text: If Anorith has any React Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Zapdos

attacks.name: Lightning Burn
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, and if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If tails, Zapdos does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: This legendary Pokémon is said to be present wherever there is a lightning storm.

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.text: Take up to 2 Lightning Energy cards from your discard pile and attach them to Lt. Surge's Electabuzz.

attacks.name: Electric Current
attacks.text: Take 1 Lightning Energy card attached to Lt. Surge's Electabuzz and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you have no Benched Pokémon, discard that Energy card.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Silver Wind
attacks.text: During your next turn, if an attack does damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack does 30 more damage.

name: Gengar

attacks.name: Life Drain
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put damage counter on the Defending Pokémon until it is 10 HP away from being Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Shadow Dance
attacks.text: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like. Then, switch Gengar with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: It hides in shadows. It is said that if Gengar is hiding, it cools that area by nearly 10 degrees F.

name: Tympole
flavorText: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.

name: Reshiram-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Glinting Claw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Brave Fire
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

name: Vespiquen

abilities.name: Defense Sign
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to your Benched Grass Pokémon by attacks.

attacks.name: Mach Wind
attacks.text: During your next turn, Vespiquen's Retreat Cost is 0.

flavorText: It raises grubs in the holes in its body. It secretes pheromones to control Combee.

name: Minun

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Tag Team Boost
attacks.text: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: Exposure to electricity from Minun and Plusle promotes blood circulation and relaxes muscles.

name: Incineroar

attacks.name: Profane Punch
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Flare Blitz
attacks.text: Discard all Fire Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it's not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer's orders with complete nonchalance.

name: Alolan Sandslash

abilities.name: Slush Rush
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw a card.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Fleeing a volcanic eruption, it settled on a snowy mountain. As it races through the snowfields, it sends up a spray of snow.

name: Tyranitar

attacks.name: Tail Crush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.text: Discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Extremely strong, it can change the landscape. It has an insolent nature that makes it not care about others.

attacks.name: Plunder
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Trainer cards attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Burst
attacks.text: If Sidney's Stadium is in play, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.text: During your next turn, Heracross E4's Megahorn attack's base damage is 100.

attacks.name: Megahorn
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Pachirisu

attacks.name: Trick Sticker
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon's Weakness is now Lightning until the end of your next turn. (The amount of Weakness doesn't change.)

attacks.name: Pachi
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

name: Magcargo

abilities.name: Smooth Over
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a card, shuffle your deck, then put that card on top of it.

flavorText: Its body is as hot as lava and is always billowing. Flames will occasionally burst from its shell.

name: Spheal

attacks.name: Unstoppable Roll
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It rolls across ice floes to reach shore because its body is poorly shaped for swimming.

name: Flareon

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.text: Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack.

flavorText: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Pikachu from your hand onto Pichu (this counts as evolving Pichu) and remove all damage counters from Pichu.

attacks.name: Energy Retrieval
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for up to 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon. Put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon for each Energy card attached in this way.

attacks.name: Damage Shift
attacks.text: Move 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon that has any on it to the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.)

attacks.name: Water Spray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

attacks.name: Birthday Surprise
attacks.text: If it's not your birthday, this attack does 30 damage. If it is your birthday, flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 50 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage.

name: Golduck BREAK
rules: BREAK Evolution Rule: Golduck BREAK retains the attacks, Abilities, Weakness, Resistance, and Retreat Cost of its previous Evolution.

abilities.name: Hyper Transfer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Delphox-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Wonder Flare
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. This attack does 40 more damage for each Energy card in your opponent's hand.

name: Pinsir

attacks.name: Irongrip
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing its victim around and toss it hard.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Gigashock
attacks.text: Choose 3 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and this attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If your opponent has fewer than 3 Benched Pokémon, do that damage to each of them.

flavorText: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power.

attacks.name: Hoard
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards and attach them to any of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon that already have a Pokémon Tool attached to them). Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Cross-Cut
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is an Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Salazzle

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Bright Flame
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Only female Salazzle exist. They emit a gas laden with pheromones to captivate male Salandit.

name: Sealeo
flavorText: It habitually spins things on its nose. By doing so, it learns textures and odors.

name: Carvanha
flavorText: Each school has its own territory. Any intruders are mercilessly attacked with fangs bared.

name: Blastoise-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Rapid Spin
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Splash Bomb
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

name: Corsola

attacks.name: Bubble Shoot
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Water Energy attached to this Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Pursued by Mareanie for the branches on its head, this Pokémon will sometimes snap its own branches off as a diversion while it escapes.

name: Torchic

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Farfetch'd

attacks.name: Leek Slap
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. Either way, you can't use this attack again as long as Farfetch'd stays in play (even putting Farfetch'd on the Bench won't let you use it again).

flavorText: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. This sprig is used much like a metal sword.

name: Oricorio

attacks.name: Supernatural Dance
attacks.text: For each Pokémon in your opponent's discard pile, put 1 damage counter on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Revelation Dance
attacks.text: If there is no Stadium card in play, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Oricorio has sipped purple nectar. Its elegant, attractive dance will send the minds and hearts of its enemies to another world.

name: Palpitoad

attacks.name: Suspicious Soundwave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.

attacks.name: Raging Tremble
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on Whiscash to each Defending Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on Whiscash to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dwindling Wave
attacks.text: Does 70 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Whiscash.

name: Sneasel

attacks.name: Swipe
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard all Trainer cards attached to your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

attacks.name: Super Psywave
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Count the number of Energy cards attached to that Pokémon. Put that many damage counters on the Pokémon.

abilities.name: Stages of Evolution
abilities.text: As long as Jynx is an Evolved Pokémon, you pay Colorless less to retreat your Fire and Psychic Pokémon.

name: Zamazenta V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Dauntless Shield
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon VMAX.

attacks.name: Assault Tackle
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ghost Hand
attacks.text: Put 1 damage counter on 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Cursed Wrath
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon SP in your discard pile.

abilities.name: Wild Guard
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Rapidash by your opponent's Pokémon SP.

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Oshawott
flavorText: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

name: Glaceon

attacks.name: Ice Shot
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

name: Piloswine

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quintuple Headbutt
attacks.text: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: With its excellent sense of smell, it's even able to find mushrooms that are buried under frozen ground.

name: Weezing

abilities.name: Surrender Now
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is discarded with the effect of Jessie & James, you may have your opponent discard a card from their hand. (They discard that card after the effect of Jessie & James.)

flavorText: If one of the twin Koffing inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.

attacks.name: Metal Load
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Metal Energy card and attach it to Metang.

abilities.name: Dual Armor
abilities.text: As long as Medicham has any Psychic Energy cards attached to it, Medicham is both Psychic and Fighting type.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Sky Uppercut
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Snap Tail
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Bastiodon

abilities.name: Protective Wall
abilities.text: Prevent all damage done to your Benched Pokémon by your opponent's attacks.

attacks.name: Anger Revenge
attacks.text: If Bastiodon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: Charmeleon

attacks.name: Raging Flames
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

flavorText: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

name: Beautifly

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Butterfly Edge
attacks.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It has an aggressive nature. It stabs prey with its long, narrow mouth to drain the prey's fluids.

name: Sudowoodo

abilities.name: Roadblock
abilities.text: Your opponent can't have more than 4 Benched Pokémon. If they have 5 or more Benched Pokémon, they discard Benched Pokémon until they have 4 Pokémon on the Bench. If more than one effect changes the number of Benched Pokémon allowed, use the smaller number.

flavorText: To avoid attack, it mimics a tree. It will run off if splashed with water, which it hates.

name: Zygarde

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.text: Discard a Fighting Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Some say it can change to an even more powerful form when battling those who threaten the ecosystem.

attacks.name: Zzzap
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to each Pokémon with a Poké-Body or Poké-Power (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance.)

attacks.name: Lightning Storm
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, put 2 damage counters on Raichu.

name: Darumaka
flavorText: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

name: Combusken

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: During a battle, the hot flame in its body increases. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

name: Koffing

attacks.name: Division
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Koffing and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.

attacks.name: Poison Scent
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Confused. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

attacks.name: Addictive Pollen
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't play Supporter cards during his or her next turn.

name: Team Aqua's Mightyena

attacks.name: Teampact
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Team Aqua Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Thanks to Mightyena's outstanding leadership, it's very good at combination attacks that can leave a foe helpless.

name: Sunflora

abilities.name: Sunshine Grace
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Grass Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Sunflora is affected by a Special Condition.

flavorText: It converts sunlight into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: Politoed

abilities.name: King's Song
abilities.text: Ignore all Colorless Energy in the attack cost of each of your Poliwag, Poliwhirl, and Poliwrath's attacks.

flavorText: Whenever three or more of these get together, they sing in a loud voice that sounds like bellowing.

name: Vanillite
flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.

name: Dhelmise

attacks.name: Sea Creeper Net
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It wraps its prey in green seaweed and sucks away their vitality. It only likes to go after big prey like Wailord.

name: Victini

abilities.name: Victory Heal
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may heal 20 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Mismagius

attacks.name: Sleeping Spell
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Poltergeist
attacks.text: Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 30 damage times the number of Trainer, Supporter, and Stadium cards in your opponent's hand.

flavorText: Its cries sound like incantations to torment the foe. It appears where you least expect it.

name: Eelektrik

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It wraps itself around its prey and paralyzes it with electricity from the round spots on its sides. Then it chomps.

name: Butterfree

attacks.name: Magic Dust
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now either Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned (your choice).

attacks.name: Hyper Reverse
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon. After doing damage, remove a number of damage counters from Butterfree equal to the amount of damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.

name: Palpitoad

attacks.name: Round
attacks.text: Does 20 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

flavorText: It lives in water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey.

name: Latios

attacks.name: Energy Draw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to Latios. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Luster Purge
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy attached to Latios.

flavorText: A highly intelligent Pokémon. By folding back its wings in flight, it can overtake jet planes.

name: Heracross

attacks.name: Pitch
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Horn Slash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

flavorText: It gathers in forests to search for tree sap, its favorite food. It's strong enough to hurl foes.

abilities.name: Sand Cover
abilities.text: As long as Hippowdon is your Active Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon LV.X between turns.

attacks.name: Save Sand
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Hippowdon. Before doing damage, you may search your discard pile for a Fighting Energy card and attach it to Hippowdon.

attacks.name: Groundquake
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon that isn't an Evolved Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon).

name: Squirtle

abilities.name: Shell Shield
abilities.text: As along as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It shelters itself in its shell then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

name: Vileplume

abilities.name: Allergy Flower
abilities.text: Each player can't play any Trainer cards from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Dazzling Pollen
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It has the world's largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Manectric

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.

name: Arcanine

attacks.name: Grand Flame
